channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fusionism: Frank Meyer's Big Idea
item.description: Will today's conservatives turn to the fusionist founder for guidance on filling the theory gap?

item.title: James Talarico's Nonbinary Political Campaign
item.description: The Senate candidate is now retreating from comments about God, gender, and other topics.

item.title: Florida Rep. Wilson Will Not Seek Ninth Term, Joining Retirement Wave
item.description: Rep. Frederica Wilson announced she will not run for reelection, adding to the wave of retirements from the House.

item.title: The Cuban Dream Dies by Cuban Hands
item.description: Only the revolution's true believers can still argue that the island's problems are caused by the United States.
